data.body:
**Completion verification: PASS** ‚Äî all six acceptance criteria are met by the implementation.

**AC1 ‚Äî Logging substrate + stdout-purity contract test:** MET.
- `src/rebar/__init__.py:29`: `logging.getLogger("rebar").addHandler(logging.NullHandler())` ‚Äî confirmed.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/__init__.py:12`: NullHandler on sibling `rebar_reconciler` root ‚Äî confirmed.
- `src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py:330`: `install_stderr_handler("rebar")` inside `main()` ‚Äî confirmed.
- `src/rebar/mcp_server.py:918`: `install_stderr_handler("rebar")` inside `main()` ‚Äî confirmed.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/__main__.py:282`: `install_stderr_handler("rebar_reconciler")` ‚Äî confirmed.
- `tests/integration/test_stdout_purity.py`: two tests ‚Äî `test_list_full_stdout_is_pure_json` (JSON parse of `rebar list --full` stdout) and `test_diagnostic_goes_to_stderr_not_stdout` (forced logger.warning, asserts diagnostic on stderr, stdout stays pure JSON) ‚Äî confirmed.
- `src/rebar/_logging.py:1-51`: convention reference docstring ‚Äî confirmed.

**AC2 ‚Äî Exemplar `llm/plan_review/` fully remediated + BLE001/T201 enabled with shrinking allowlist:** MET.
- All 29 `except Exception`/`except BaseException` sites in `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/` carry justified `# noqa: BLE001 ‚Äî <reason>` ‚Äî confirmed by exhaustive search.
- `pyproject.toml:184`: `select = ["E", "F", "W", "I", "UP", "B", "BLE001", "T201"]` ‚Äî confirmed.
- `pyproject.toml:209-240`: per-file-ignores table with permanent legitimate-print surfaces ‚Äî confirmed; `plan_review/` is absent from it.
- `tests/unit/test_error_handling_convention.py`: three tests prove BLE001/T201 fire on `plan_review/` paths and are suppressed on allowlisted paths ‚Äî confirmed.

**AC3 ‚Äî ~100 unguarded broad-except sites remediated to the observability floor:** MET.
- Exhaustive search across all of `src/rebar`: every `except Exception:` and `except BaseException:` carries `# noqa: BLE001 ‚Äî <reason>`. Zero unjustified or bare silent swallows found. BLE001 is selected tree-wide with no src/-package-level exemptions, so a new unguarded blind-except fails CI.

**AC4 ‚Äî Opportunistic narrowing surfaced previously-hidden bugs (non-vacuous):** MET.
- `tests/unit/test_json_or_narrowing.py`: `_json_or` narrowed to `json.JSONDecodeError` ‚Äî unmasked a silently-swallowed `TypeError` on non-str input; regression test pins the fix.
- `tests/unit/grounding/test_harness.py:141` (`test_worker_entry_propagates_interrupts`): grounding worker boundary narrowed from `except BaseException` (inert `BLE0001` typo) to `except Exception` ‚Äî `KeyboardInterrupt`/`SystemExit` now propagate; regression test confirms.

**AC5 ‚Äî Convention documented in CLAUDE.md:** MET.
- `CLAUDE.md:251-282`: full "Error-handling convention" section covering all required topics ‚Äî named-logger substrate, stdout-is-sacred, MCP raise-don't-catch, observability floor + `# noqa: BLE001 ‚Äî <reason>` rule, T201 scope ‚Äî plus pointer to `src/rebar/_logging.py` as the canonical reference.

**AC6 ‚Äî Allowlist emptied; `make lint` + full test suite pass:** MET (as resolved by plan-review G6).
- `pyproject.toml:186-213`: BLE001 has zero src/-package exemptions; all surviving T201 per-file-ignores are documented permanent legitimate-print surfaces (tests/**, _engine_support, _commands, _alias.py, rebar_reconciler, jira-capability-probe) ‚Äî not transitional entries. The shrinking allowlist is fully drained.
- Both regression tests and the broader suite (3215 passed/13 skipped, per close-out landing comment) are in place. BLE001 enabled tree-wide makes the unguarded blind-except cluster structurally impossible via the lint gate.
